features.name: Project Registry
features.description: Register seven-layer projects with tech stack, owners, and entrypoints.

features.name: Task Planning
features.description: Epic/Story/Task planning with dependencies and milestones.

features.name: Incremental Progress
features.description: Progress tracking driven by Git activity and milestone status.

features.name: Build/Test Orchestration
features.description: Unified build and test runners for Java and Python services.

features.name: Boot Sequence
features.description: Single command to bring up individual layers or the whole stack.

features.name: Audit & Approvals
features.description: Record all control actions and require approvals for risky operations.

features.name: Observability Hooks
features.description: Standard hooks for logs, metrics, traces, and quality gates.

features.name: Architecture & Docs
features.description: Generate and maintain architecture.md and docs index.
